Interactive map of all solar projects, currently across 5 countries. 

Hover for project names, click for further details. Filter by country and stage of installation.
properties.uganda_info_box_text: Aid Pioneers, in partnership with Mandulis Energy, is launching an innovative project in Northern Uganda to install four solar systems at healthcare facilities, transforming them into charging hubs for electric vehicles (EVs). This approach addresses three core challenges芒聙聰absence of grid infrastructure, unaffordable solar access, and low local energy demand芒聙聰by combining clean energy with affordable EV leasing that creates jobs and delivers electricity to families. The initiative is projected to save lives, support over 480 families, reduce 2,500 tons of CO芒聜聜 over ten years, and enable 350 urgent treatments daily. With strong repayment potential, the project presents a financially sound and high-impact investment opportunity. We are currently actively fundraising to initiate implementation and invite aligned partners to join us in scaling this transformative model.
